div.class: p-4 bg-light d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center rounded-top

div.p: Process field orders into invoices, register received payments, and manage shop credit limits.

button.class: btn btn-outline-secondary fw-bold shadow-sm d-inline-flex align-items-center bg-white
button.title: Refresh Live Data

div.class: row g-3 px-4 pb-4 bg-light border-bottom
card bg-white border-0 shadow-sm p-3 h-100 rounded-4
card bg-white border-0 shadow-sm p-3 h-100 rounded-4
card bg-white border-0 shadow-sm p-3 h-100 rounded-4
card bg-white border-0 shadow-sm p-3 h-100 rounded-4
card bg-white border-0 shadow-sm p-3 h-100 rounded-4
d-flex flex-column flex-lg-row justify-content-between align-items-lg-end gap-3 mb-4

div.p: See cash collected, paid out, and what shops still owe — without opening the full ledger.

button.class: btn btn-dark fw-bold text-white
card border-0 shadow-sm p-3 h-100 rounded-4 text-start w-100 bg-white
button.title: Open collected cash activity

button.class: card border-0 shadow-sm p-3 h-100 rounded-4 text-start w-100 bg-white
button.title: Open paid-out cash activity

button.class: card border-0 shadow-sm p-3 h-100 rounded-4 text-start w-100 bg-white
button.title: Open all cash activity

button.class: card border-0 shadow-sm p-3 h-100 rounded-4 text-start w-100 bg-white
button.title: Open shop balances

div.p: Amount still open on posted shop invoices.

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-dark fw-bold
btn btn-sm btn-dark fw-bold text-white
btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary fw-bold
btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary fw-bold
btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary fw-bold

div.p: Flow: Sold (invoices) → Collected (cash in) → Still with shops → Paid back (cash out).

div.class: d-flex flex-column flex-md-row justify-content-between align-items-md-center gap-2

div.small: Money in and out across bank & cash journals.

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary fw-bold

ul.class: nav nav-tabs border-0 flex-nowrap text-nowrap mb-0

button.t-attf-class: nav-link bg-transparent border-0 fw-bold pb-2 fs-6 #{this.state.invoiceSubTab === 'all_orders' ? 'text-primary border-bottom border-primary border-3 rounded-0' : 'text-muted'}
button.title: View all sales orders created from the field

button.t-attf-class: nav-link bg-transparent border-0 fw-bold pb-2 fs-6 #{this.state.invoiceSubTab === 'orders' ? 'text-primary border-bottom border-primary border-3 rounded-0' : 'text-muted'}
button.title: Confirmed orders waiting to be billed

button.t-attf-class: nav-link bg-transparent border-0 fw-bold pb-2 fs-6 #{this.state.invoiceSubTab === 'customer_invoices' ? 'text-primary border-bottom border-primary border-3 rounded-0' : 'text-muted'}
button.title: View draft, posted, and paid invoices

button.t-attf-class: nav-link bg-transparent border-0 fw-bold pb-2 fs-6 #{this.state.invoiceSubTab === 'payments' ? 'text-primary border-bottom border-primary border-3 rounded-0' : 'text-muted'}
button.title: Log of all money collected from shops

button.t-attf-class: nav-link bg-transparent border-0 fw-bold pb-2 fs-6 #{this.state.invoiceSubTab === 'credit_notes' ? 'text-primary border-bottom border-primary border-3 rounded-0' : 'text-muted'}
button.title: View refunded invoices and credit notes

button.t-attf-class: nav-link bg-transparent border-0 fw-bold pb-2 fs-6 #{this.state.invoiceSubTab === 'balances' ? 'text-primary border-bottom border-primary border-3 rounded-0' : 'text-muted'}
button.title: Set credit limits and view outstanding debt per shop

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-3 bg-light border-bottom

span.t-attf-class: badge #{ord.status === 'Confirmed' ? 'bg-primary' : ord.status === 'Cancelled' ? 'bg-danger' : 'bg-secondary'} text-white px-2 py-1 shadow-sm

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light border fw-bold px-3 shadow-sm
btn btn-primary fw-bold text-white shadow-sm px-4

div.class: card p-0 shadow-sm border-0 border-start border-4 border-dark overflow-hidden
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center border-top pt-3 mt-2 border-secondary
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-3 bg-light border-bottom

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-dark fw-bold px-3
button.title: Open this order to verify items and generate a bill

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light border fw-bold px-3 shadow-sm
button.title: Go back to the pending orders list

button.class: btn btn-primary fw-bold text-white shadow-sm px-4

div.class: card p-0 shadow-sm border-0 border-start border-4 border-primary overflow-hidden
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center border-top pt-3 mt-2 border-secondary
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-3 bg-light border-bottom

tr.title: Click to view details or register payment

span.t-attf-class: badge text-white #{inv.status === 'Paid' ? 'bg-success' : inv.status === 'Posted' ? 'bg-info ' : inv.status === 'Partial' ? 'bg-warning text-dark' : inv.status === 'Cancelled' ? 'bg-danger' : 'bg-secondary'} px-2 py-1 shadow-sm

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light border fw-bold px-3 shadow-sm
btn btn-sm btn-success fw-bold text-white px-3 shadow-sm
btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary fw-bold bg-white px-3 shadow-sm
btn btn-outline-dark fw-bold px-3
btn btn-outline-primary fw-bold bg-white px-3
button.title: Modify quantities and prices

button.class: btn btn-outline-danger fw-bold bg-white px-3
button.title: Cancel this draft invoice

button.class: btn btn-warning fw-bold text-dark px-3
button.title: Revert this invoice back to draft to make corrections or cancel

button.class: btn btn-success fw-bold text-white px-3 shadow-sm
button.title: Finalize this invoice to post it to the shop's ledger

button.class: btn btn-success fw-bold text-white px-4 shadow-sm
button.title: Record a payment received for this specific invoice

button.class: btn btn-danger fw-bold text-white px-3 shadow-sm
button.title: Create a Credit Note to refund this invoice before cancelling

div.t-attf-class: card p-0 shadow-sm border-0 border-start border-4 #{this.state.selectedInvoice.status === 'Paid' ? 'border-success' : this.state.selectedInvoice.status === 'Cancelled' ? 'border-danger' : this.state.selectedInvoice.status === 'Partial' ? 'border-warning' : 'border-info'}

span.t-attf-class: badge fs-6 #{this.state.selectedInvoice.status === 'Paid' ? 'bg-success' : this.state.selectedInvoice.status === 'Posted' ? 'bg-info' : this.state.selectedInvoice.status === 'Partial' ? 'bg-warning text-dark' : this.state.selectedInvoice.status === 'Cancelled' ? 'bg-danger' : 'bg-secondary'} px-3 py-2 text-white shadow-sm

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger
btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary fw-bold

div.small: Totals will update automatically after you Save Changes.

div.class: position-fixed top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center border-bottom pb-3 mb-4

div.small: Reverse this paid invoice to balance the ledger.

button.class: btn btn-light fw-bold border px-4
btn btn-danger fw-bold text-white px-4 shadow-sm

div.class: position-fixed top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center border-bottom pb-3 mb-4

div.small: Record cash or bank deposits received from the shop.

div.label: Payment Amount (Rs.)
div.small: Enter a lesser amount for a partial payment.

select.title: Select where the money is being deposited

button.class: btn btn-light fw-bold border px-4
btn btn-success fw-bold text-white px-4 shadow-sm

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-3 bg-light border-bottom

tr.title: Click to view credit note details

span.t-attf-class: badge text-white #{cn.status === 'Paid/Reconciled' ? 'bg-success' : cn.status === 'Posted' ? 'bg-info ' : cn.status === 'Cancelled' ? 'bg-danger' : 'bg-secondary'} px-2 py-1 shadow-sm

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light border fw-bold px-3 shadow-sm
btn btn-sm btn-success fw-bold text-white px-3 shadow-sm
btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary fw-bold bg-white px-3 shadow-sm
btn btn-outline-dark fw-bold px-3
btn btn-outline-primary fw-bold bg-white px-3
button.title: Modify quantities and prices

button.class: btn btn-outline-danger fw-bold bg-white px-3
button.title: Cancel this draft refund

button.class: btn btn-warning fw-bold text-dark px-3
button.title: Revert back to draft

button.class: btn btn-success fw-bold text-white px-3 shadow-sm
button.title: Finalize this refund

button.class: btn btn-success fw-bold text-white px-4 shadow-sm
button.title: Record outgoing payment for this refund

div.t-attf-class: card p-0 shadow-sm border-0 border-start border-4 #{this.state.selectedInvoice.status === 'Paid' ? 'border-success' : this.state.selectedInvoice.status === 'Posted' ? 'border-info' : this.state.selectedInvoice.status === 'Partial' ? 'border-warning text-dark' : this.state.selectedInvoice.status === 'Cancelled' ? 'border-danger' : 'border-secondary'}

span.t-attf-class: badge fs-6 #{this.state.selectedInvoice.status === 'Paid' ? 'bg-success' : this.state.selectedInvoice.status === 'Posted' ? 'bg-info' : this.state.selectedInvoice.status === 'Partial' ? 'bg-warning text-dark' : this.state.selectedInvoice.status === 'Cancelled' ? 'bg-danger' : 'bg-secondary'} px-3 py-2 text-white shadow-sm

thead.class: bg-light text-muted small text-uppercase fw-bold border-bottom

tr.td: No products found on this document.

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger
button.title: Remove Product

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary fw-bold

div.small: Totals will update automatically after you Save Changes.

div.class: position-fixed top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center border-bottom pb-3 mb-4

div.small: Record cash or bank deposits received from the shop.

div.label: Payment Amount (Rs.)
div.small: Enter a lesser amount for a partial payment.

select.title: Select where the money is being deposited

button.class: btn btn-light fw-bold border px-4
btn btn-success fw-bold text-white px-4 shadow-sm

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-3 bg-light border-bottom

tr.title: Click to view payment receipt details

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light border fw-bold px-3 shadow-sm mb-4

div.class: card p-4 shadow-sm border-0 border-start border-4 border-success
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3 border-bottom pb-3

span.class: badge bg-success text-white px-3 py-2 shadow-sm fs-6

p.class: mb-0 bg-light p-3 border rounded-3 mt-2 text-dark

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-3 bg-light border-bottom

th.title: Amount currently owed by the shop

tr.title: Click to view ledger and adjust credit limits

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light border fw-bold px-3 shadow-sm mb-4

div.class: card p-4 shadow-sm border-0 border-start border-4 border-warning

div.label: Approved Credit Limit (Rs.)
div.small: Adjusting this limit will automatically allow or prevent your order bookers from finalizing new orders for this shop.

button.class: btn btn-dark fw-bold text-white px-5 shadow-sm
button.title: Apply the new credit limit to this shop's account

div.class: d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-between align-items-center p-3 bg-light border-bottom gap-3

div.small: Analyzes invoiced sales vs product cost over your selected period.

div.class: d-flex align-items-center gap-2 bg-white p-2 rounded-3 shadow-sm border

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-dark fw-bold px-3 ms-2
btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger fw-bold px-3 text-nowrap

div.class: card bg-white border-0 shadow-sm h-100 rounded-4 overflow-hidden position-relative

span.class: fw-bold text-muted text-uppercase tracking-wider small d-block mb-1

div.class: text-black rounded-circle d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center shadow-sm
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center pt-2 border-top mt-3
card bg-white border-0 shadow-sm h-100 rounded-4 overflow-hidden position-relative

span.class: fw-bold text-muted text-uppercase tracking-wider small d-block mb-1

div.class: text-black rounded-circle d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center shadow-sm

div.small: Cost value of products sold net of returns.

div.class: card bg-white border-0 shadow-sm h-100 rounded-4 overflow-hidden position-relative

span.class: fw-bold text-muted text-uppercase tracking-wider small d-block mb-1

div.t-attf-class: rounded-circle d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center shadow-sm text-black

div.small: Net Sales minus Cost of Goods.

div.class: card bg-white border-0 shadow-sm p-3 h-100 rounded-4 d-flex flex-row align-items-center

small.class: fw-bold text-muted text-uppercase tracking-wider d-block mb-1

div.class: card bg-white border-0 shadow-sm p-3 h-100 rounded-4 d-flex flex-row align-items-center

small.class: fw-bold text-muted text-uppercase tracking-wider d-block mb-1

div.class: card bg-white border-0 shadow-sm p-3 h-100 rounded-4 d-flex flex-row align-items-center

small.class: fw-bold text-muted text-uppercase tracking-wider d-block mb-1

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-4 overflow-hidden mt-4
card-header bg-white border-bottom py-3 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap gap-2
bg-primary text-white rounded p-2 me-3 shadow-sm d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center
p-4 bg-white border-bottom d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

div.small: Quickly identify shops that are nearing or exceeding their allowed credit capacity.

th.title: How much of their credit limit the shop has currently used
Amount of credit remaining before they reach their limit
Healthy: Under 80%. Critical: 80% to 100%. Exceeded: Over 100%

span.t-attf-class: badge #{credit.status === 'Healthy' ? 'bg-success text-white' : credit.status === 'Critical' ? 'bg-warning text-dark' : credit.status === 'Exceeded' ? 'bg-danger text-white' : 'bg-info text-white'} px-3 py-1 shadow-sm
